heading: Prohibiting discrimination in the intelligence community
label: 3334b–1 Prohibiting discrimination in the intelligence community

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Not later than 90 days after , the Director of National Intelligence, in coordination with the head of each element of the intelligence community, shall revise all regulations, policies, procedures, manuals, circulars, courses, training, and guidance in the intelligence community such that all such materials are in compliance with and consistent with this section.December 18, 2025

children.heading: Prohibition
children.label: b Prohibition
children.text: None of the funds authorized to be appropriated by any law for the National Intelligence Program shall be used for the purposes of implementing covered practices in the intelligence community.

children.heading: Covered practice defined
children.label: c Covered practice defined
children.text: In this section, the term “covered practice” means any practice that discriminates for or against any person in a manner prohibited by the Constitution of the United States, the Civil Rights Act of 1964 ( et seq.), or any other Federal law.42 U.S.C. 20001So in original. Probably should be “2000a”.1
